stemHtml: Which of the following best describes the relationship and commonalities between ICAO Annex 17 and Regulation (EC) No 300/2008?

options.a: ICAO Annex 17 is legally binding for all member states, and the EC regulation establishes common rules and basic standards on aviation security. It aims to prevent acts of unlawful interference with civil aircraft.
options.b: Both regulations refer to international civil and military airports and the purpose is to maintain their safety.
options.c: Both regulations refer to facilitation of entry and departure procedures on international airports.
options.d: ICAO Annex 17 is legally binding for all member states, and the EC regulation establishes common rules on aviation security. It aims to prevent acts of unlawful interference with civil and military aircraft.
